desc: All US ships leave Bahrain port as fleet evacuates to open water
IRGCN lays mines near Strait western approach
Mines detected near Larak Island channel
USN 5th Fleet deploys minesweepers to Strait
Commercial shipping halted through Strait
Bab el-Mandeb crossings drop sharply — 14 transits
Houthis declare Red Sea a war zone for US/Israeli-linked vessels
Second wave of mines laid near Musandam
Royal Navy HMS Montrose joins mine countermeasures
All tanker traffic diverted via Fujairah pipeline
Bab el-Mandeb traffic — 11 crossings amid Houthi threats
Anti-ship ballistic missile fired at container ship south of Mocha
Drone swarm targets tanker near Bab el-Mandeb
USN MCM clears 4 mines from western channel
French frigate Languedoc patrols eastern approach
Bab el-Mandeb — 9 crossings, major carriers suspended
Houthi missile near-miss on bulk carrier off Hodeidah
USS Eisenhower CSG intercepts 2 drones over Red Sea
Additional mines found drifting near Qeshm
Coalition clears mines from outbound lane
Combined Task Force 152 sweeps intensify
Bab el-Mandeb — 7 crossings as Cape rerouting accelerates
Two drones hit commercial tanker — crew evacuated
EUNAVFOR Aspides deploys to southern Red Sea
Eastern approach partially cleared
First escorted tanker convoy transits Strait
Bab el-Mandeb — 6 crossings, Saudi Yanbu pivot begins
USN establishes minesweeping corridor
Houthi ASBM targets destroyer — intercepted by SM-2
Uncrewed surface vessel detected near Bab el-Mandeb
Western approach declared partially navigable
Limited escorted convoys resume — 5 tankers transit
Bab el-Mandeb — 8 crossings, VLCCs heading to Yanbu
Missile barrage targets three vessels in Bab el-Mandeb
Coalition air patrols over central Red Sea intensify
New mines discovered along inbound lane
Convoy operations continue under escort
Bab el-Mandeb — 10 crossings, Saudi crude tankers dominate
Multinational force expands sweep zone
Suicide drone boat detonates near tanker off Mocha
Coalition clears newly laid mines from inbound lane
8 tankers transit in two convoy groups
Bab el-Mandeb — 12 crossings, Saudi Red Sea export at record
Two ASBMs launched at Red Sea — both intercepted
Djibouti-based P-8 maritime patrol flights doubled
IRGCN speedboats spotted laying mines at night
USN helicopter patrols detect mine-laying activity
Convoy paused pending new mine clearance
Bab el-Mandeb — 15 crossings, 27 VLCCs en route to Yanbu
Houthi drone swarm — 5 drones attack container ship
Mine-like object reported near Hanish Islands
MH-53E helicopters clear contact mines
Convoys resume after 24hr pause
Bab el-Mandeb — 18 crossings, Saudi export pivot in full effect
Lull in Houthi attacks — back-channel talks reported
12 tankers transit — highest since conflict began
Bab el-Mandeb — 16 crossings, below 21/day average
CTF-152 declares outbound lane 90% cleared
Houthi resumes attacks — ASBM hits Greek-owned tanker
Combined Maritime Force escorts Red Sea convoy
Drifting mines found near Hormuz Island
10 vessel convoy transits safely
Bab el-Mandeb — 19 crossings, Yanbu at max berth capacity
Two missiles target Suez-bound vessel — one hit, minor damage
Hormuz Island mines neutralized
Escorted convoys now routine — 9 transits
Bab el-Mandeb — 14 crossings, Suez volume down 32%
Mine countermeasure ops continue 24/7
Major Houthi attack: 8 drones + 2 missiles at convoy
USS Bataan ARG provides Red Sea air defense
11 tankers transit in three convoy windows
Bab el-Mandeb — 17 crossings, Saudi crude tankers + container ships
No new mines detected — sweeps continue
Houthi fires at two vessels — both miss wide
Steady convoy ops — 10 transits today
Bab el-Mandeb — 16 crossings, below pre-war ~35/day normal
Coalition maintains 24/7 minesweeping posture
2 drifting mines detected south of Qeshm
Houthi claims responsibility for tanker fire off Hodeidah
EUNAVFOR Aspides intercepts drone near Bab el-Mandeb
IRGC declares full control of Strait — "any transit will be targeted"
Near-zero commercial transit; de facto blockade continues
Bab el-Mandeb — minimal crossings amid expanded IRGC warnings
Drifting mines reported south of Qeshm — sweeps ongoing
Trump calls for multinational naval coalition to secure strait
UK exploring options to help reopen Strait of Hormuz
Pakistan-flagged tanker Karachi transits strait with AIS — first non-Iranian transit
Bab el-Mandeb — minimal crossings; Houthis holding fire
Iran FM: Strait closed only to US, Israel and their allies
EU discusses expanding Operation Aspides to Persian Gulf
Mine-sweeping operations continue south of Qeshm
CENTCOM: Kharg Island strike destroyed mine/missile bunkers
India: 2 LPG tankers transit Hormuz after freeing seized Iranian ships
Iran still exporting ~1M bpd from Kharg Island; 6 VLCCs with AIS off
Tanker struck by projectile 23nm east of Fujairah — first in 5 days
Fujairah Oil Industry Zone hit by drone — fire reported, no casualties
Tankers "dribble" through Hormuz via Iran-controlled Larak-Qeshm gap — Pakistan, India, Turkey ships transit
Bab el-Mandeb — minimal crossings; Houthis holding fire
Macron begins talks with India, Arab states on independent Hormuz escort
Trump: NATO allies refuse Hormuz role — "I'm disappointed"
UAE signals willingness to join US-led Hormuz coalition — first Gulf state
Iraq formally requests Iran for oil tanker safe passage through Hormuz
USS Gerald Ford heading to Souda Bay, Crete for fire repairs — at least one week
US drops GBU-72 5,000-lb bunker-buster bombs on Iranian anti-ship missile sites along Hormuz coast
IRGC threatens imminent strikes on Saudi, UAE, Qatar energy facilities
US-Israeli strikes hit South Pars gas field and Asaluyeh refineries — shared with Qatar
~90 ships crossed Hormuz since war began — 16 oil tankers; mostly Iran-linked, some India/Pakistan/Turkey
Bab el-Mandeb — minimal crossings continue; Houthis holding fire
Iraq resumes pipeline oil exports to Turkey's Ceyhan port after Baghdad-KRG deal
Iran projectile lands near UAE base hosting Australian troops
Renewed drone/rocket attacks on US Embassy Baghdad — rockets intercepted
Iranian missiles cause extensive damage to Qatar's Ras Laffan LNG hub — world's largest
Saudi Arabia intercepts 4 ballistic missiles headed toward Riyadh; Aramco evacuates Samref
Vessel struck by "unknown projectile" 11nm east of Khor Fakkan — fire onboard (UKMTO)
UAE: Habshan gas facilities and Bab oil field hit by interception debris — operations suspended
Second Iranian missile strike on Ras Laffan — "sizeable fires and extensive further damage" (early Thu)
Iranian missiles hit Kuwait Mina Al-Ahmadi and Mina Abdullah refineries — first strikes on Kuwait
Follow-up strikes on UAE Habshan gas complex — ADNOC suspends all operations
Iranian missiles hit Saudi Yanbu refinery complex on Red Sea coast
Vessel struck near Ras Laffan LNG terminal — taking on water
Vessel struck 15nm off Khor Fakkan — fire and damage
Hormuz transits further reduced — 3 non-Iranian vessels detected, mostly Chinese-flagged
Bab el-Mandeb — Houthi activity low; 2 crossings detected
UKMTO emergency advisory: all commercial shipping avoid central Gulf until further notice
UKMTO: vessel hit by unknown projectile 4nm east of Ras Laffan — threat zone expanding to LNG terminals
UK/France/Germany/Italy/Netherlands/Japan: ready to contribute to Hormuz safe passage efforts
IDF confirms strikes on Iranian naval vessels at Caspian Sea military port
IDF destroys 16+ IRGCN fast-attack boats at Bandar Lengeh — key Hormuz staging point ablaze
Two drone waves hit Kuwait Mina Al-Ahmadi refinery again — fires reignited
Dubai area air defense intercepts — explosions over Al Minhad
Iran vetting system allows ~9 ships through Hormuz safe corridor — up from 3
Bab el-Mandeb — 3 transits detected, Houthi activity minimal
Macron begins UNSC consultations on multilateral Hormuz navigation framework
Saudi intercepts 10 drones from east + 1 from north — debris hits Bahrain warehouse
IDF strikes Bandar Anzali on Caspian Sea — IRIS Deylaman frigate and dozens of vessels destroyed
USS Boxer ARG with 11th MEU deploying from California; USS Tripoli arriving from Japan
Hezbollah long-range missile hits Ashkelon area — 200km range marks new escalation
Iran fires 2 IRBMs at Diego Garcia — 4,000km range shock; neither missile hits
IDF overnight strikes hit regime targets in Tehran and Hezbollah targets in Beirut
Saudi intercepts 22+ drones targeting eastern oil infrastructure overnight
Kuwait air defense engages incoming threats targeting Al-Ahmadi area
Hormuz vetting expanded — ~10 ships through corridor, Japan offer widens access
Bab el-Mandeb — 3 transits detected, Houthi activity minimal
UK approves US use of RAF Akrotiri and Indian Ocean bases for Hormuz operations
Coalition mine clearance continues — no major incidents reported
Coalition strikes hit Natanz nuclear enrichment facility overnight — IAEA confirms no leaks
Saudi intercepts 47+ drones — 38 in concentrated barrage targeting Ras Tanura terminal
Drone strikes Iraqi intelligence HQ in Baghdad — 1 killed, 1 wounded
Hezbollah-IDF 4-hour ground battle at Khiam — heaviest infantry engagement of conflict
Hormuz — ~8 ships through vetting corridor; parliament debates transit fees
Bab el-Mandeb — 4 transits, Houthi activity low
22-nation Hormuz safe passage statement signed — UAE first Arab Gulf state to join
Panama Canal at max capacity (36-38 vessels/day) from LNG rerouting
Saudi intercepts ~60 drones + 3 BMs toward Riyadh — expels Iranian diplomats persona non grata
Iranian missiles hit Dimona and Arad — 160+ injured near Negev nuclear facility; IAEA confirms no damage
IDF destroys bridges over Litani River — Lebanon president calls it "prelude to ground invasion"
US bunker busters hit Natanz again (2nd strike in 48 hours) + coastal missile storage facility
Iraq: Islamic Resistance claims 21 attacks on US bases; 3 drones intercepted near Erbil airport
IDF kills IRGC Drone Commander BG Saeed Agha Jani — directed drone ops for Russia and proxies
Hormuz — ~7 ships through vetting corridor; IRGC threatens "complete closure" if power plants hit
Bab el-Mandeb — 3 transits; Houthis warn Bahrain/UAE they "will be first to lose"
2,500 additional Marines with amphibious capability dispatched — Kharg Island speculation
5 Gulf nations + UK/France/Germany condemn Iran's "de facto closure" of Hormuz
IDF strikes IRGC main HQ compound in central Tehran + Hezbollah infrastructure in southern Beirut
3 massive explosions in Beirut southern suburbs — Hezbollah infrastructure hit
UK deploying Rapid Sentry air defense to Bahrain, Kuwait, Saudi; HMS Dragon to eastern Med
USS Ford arrives Souda Bay, Crete for repairs after laundry fire
Pentagon weighing 82nd Airborne (3,000 paratroopers) — 2nd MEU departs California
Two tankers bound for India transit Hormuz
HMS Dragon arrives eastern Mediterranean
Kuwait intercepts Iranian missiles twice — 7 power lines knocked out
Saudi intercepts 5 drones overnight; Bahrain sirens multiple times
Two tankers transit Red Sea southbound under escort
Iran tells UN/IMO: "non-hostile" ships may transit Hormuz with coordination — 6 vessels openly transit
Iranian missiles hit Kurdish Peshmerga base near Erbil — 6 killed, 30 wounded
Iranian missile kills Moroccan contractor in Bahrain, wounds 5 Emirati service members
Projectile hits Bushehr Nuclear Power Plant premises — IAEA confirms no reactor damage
5 vessels transit Hormuz via Tehran-approved route past Larak Island
Red Sea escort convoy: 2 tankers northbound toward Suez under coalition guard
US officials confirm ~dozen Maham 3/7 limpet mines laid by Iran in Strait of Hormuz
82nd Airborne deployment: 1,000 paratroopers preparing to deploy to Middle East
Kuwait Airport fuel tank hit by drone — fire at site
IRGC charging $2M transit fees at Larak Island checkpoint
Chinese state-owned feeder tanker pays $2M fee for Hormuz safe passage
8 vessels transit Hormuz free of charge as Iran "show of sincerity"
Red Sea escort convoy: 3 tankers southbound under coalition guard
IDF targeted strike kills IRGCN commander Tangsiri — Hormuz blockade architect
Intense evening bombardment of Tehran — residential areas and command facilities hit
Missile and drone attack on Prince Sultan Air Base — 12 US troops injured, KC-135s damaged
Hormuz toll system formalized — $2M per vessel; 3 ships warned not to pass
Red Sea escort convoy: 2 tankers northbound under coalition guard
Houthi ballistic missile launched from Yemen toward Israel — intercepted
Intercepted Iranian ballistic missile debris causes fires in Abu Dhabi
Strikes on Isfahan and Ahvaz steel plants — civilian industrial targets
Iran approves 20 Pakistani vessels for Hormuz — 2 per day via Larak route
IRGCN fast attack craft patrolling Larak-Qeshm gap as "toll collectors"
Red Sea: 3 vessels escorted northbound under coalition guard
USS Tripoli amphibious assault ship arrives in CENTCOM AOR
Houthi second barrage toward Israel — ballistic missiles, drones intercepted
Bahrain intercepts 6 more drones — 391 total drones since Feb 28
20+ vessels cross Hormuz since Mar 28; 50+ containerships stranded west of strait
MARAD advisory: AIS used for targeting in Red Sea
10 Kuwaiti military personnel injured in Iranian attack
Kuwait desalination plant attacked — Indian worker killed
COSCO ULCCs initially denied then completed Hormuz crossing
8 vessels transit Hormuz — small increase but still under 10% of pre-war average; two Chinese-flagged tankers complete crossings
Hegseth says Hormuz "not blockaded" — CENTCOM data shows 48 vessels in 7 days vs 138/day historical average
Red Sea escort convoy: 2 vessels northbound under EUNAVFOR Aspides guard
Kuwaiti VLCC Al Salmi struck by Iranian drone at Port of Dubai — fire breaks out; first attack on UAE port facility
8 vessels transit Hormuz — majority Iranian-linked; non-Iranian traffic remains under 10% of pre-war average
IRGCN fast attack craft enforce IRGC toll system; vessels required to submit cargo manifests for clearance
Red Sea: 2 vessels northbound under EUNAVFOR Aspides escort
7 vessels transit Hormuz — IRGC declares strait 'fully under our control'; 201 total crossings in March, down 95% from peacetime
IRGCN maintains toll-booth operations; cargo manifest verification required for non-Iranian vessels
Houthi missile and drone barrage toward Red Sea coalition vessels — 3rd large attack this week
Red Sea: 1 vessel northbound under coalition escort — traffic remains near historic lows
